title: MJP Publishers Data Analytics Workflow in R
description: A flowchart illustrating the end-to-end process of analyzing MJP Publishers' book sales and marketing data using R, from data sourcing to actionable business insights.
elements: Data Sources (Sales Records, Marketing Spend, Web Analytics)
Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA - ggplot2, summary stats)
Statistical Modeling (lm, glm for sales forecasting)
relationships: Data flows from Sources to be Imported and Wrangled
Cleaned data is used for EDA to generate hypotheses
Insights from EDA inform Statistical Modeling
Model results are visualized and reported
Final report drives a Business Decision for MJP Publishers
